name: owasp_review
prompt_fragment: Check for OWASP Top 10: A01 Broken Access Control, A02 Cryptographic Failures, A03 Injection, A04 Insecure Design, A05 Security Misconfiguration, A06 Vulnerable Components, A07 Authentication Failures, A08 Software Integrity Failures, A09 Logging Failures, A10 SSRF.
